case_title: HOWARD THOMAS PATRICK VS MINASIAN SEVAN DBA JAGUAR ENGINE SERVICE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HOWARD THOMAS PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT MINASIAN SEVAN DBA JAGUAR ENGINE SERVICE HORTA MICHAEL DBA AUTO SERVICE CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HORTA MICHAEL DBA AUTO SERVICE CENTER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MINASIAN SEVAN DBA JAGUAR ENGINE SERVICE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWARD THOMAS PATRICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MINASIAN SEVAN DBA JAGUAR ENGINE SERVICE HORTA MICHAEL DBA AUTO SERVICE CENTER PLTF'S TO PROVIDE DEF.W/NEW INTERMEDIATE DRIVE SOLEROID & GUIDE LUBE BELLOWS BY 7/15/92. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
